name: prepedu-exam-platform
description: Secure Electron exam platform with anti-cheating measures

scripts.build:unpack: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:win: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:local:mac: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && GCS_BUCKET=local-dev CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:local:dir: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && electron scripts/compile-bytecode.cjs && GCS_BUCKET=local-dev CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
